pages.text: The Froglight Crucible melts a Froglight into molten fluid. It needs heat from the block below - put a heat source under it and drop Froglights in. It also melts cobblestone, stone, gravel, and netherrack straight to lava.
The Casting Mold sets molten metal into ingots or blocks. Stack a Mold on a Crucible to make a melt-and-cast tower, or feed it by pipe. Heat below, Crucible, Mold on top - that is the lane.
